sections.heading: Cloverdale's BBB-accredited plumbing contractor

items.title: Plumbing Repairs & Service
items.description: Diagnosis and repair of leaks, fixtures, drains and everyday plumbing problems for homes and businesses.

items.title: Water Heater Installation & Repair
items.description: Repair and replacement of tank and tankless water heaters, sized and installed to code.

items.title: Re-Piping
items.description: Whole-house and partial re-piping to replace aging or failing supply lines.

items.title: Septic & General Repairs
items.description: Septic service plus the full range of general residential and commercial plumbing repairs across north Sonoma County.

items.body: We look at the details and talk through the right approach with you.

items.title: We do the work

items.title: You’re set
items.body: The job’s done right, and we stand behind it.

sections.heading: About Regina Plumbing
body: Regina Plumbing is a family-run plumbing contractor based on N Washington Street in Cloverdale, serving Cloverdale, Healdsburg, Geyserville and the rest of north Sonoma County. Longtime neighbors know the Regina team as honest, experienced and efficient — the kind of local plumber who shows up, does the highest-quality work and charges a fair price.

From everyday repairs and water-heater installs to whole-house re-piping, septic and general service work, Regina Plumbing handles residential and commercial jobs across the north county. The company is fully licensed and insured under California contractor's license #857665 and is BBB A+ accredited (accredited since 2017).

items.quote: Regina Plumbing is outstanding, professional and does the highest-quality work at a fair price.
